### Post by michael37 on 2007-08-30
First, you are trying to use a mix of Xgl and AIGLX.  They don't mix.  Recommendations for the latest versions of Nvidia video drivers is to use AIGLX.  That means comment your Xgl stuff out.

A lot of people have had luck running Compiz Fusion on Feisty and Gutsy.  You are running a significantly older version of Ubuntu.  I recommend upgrading to Feisty.  Your uname -a will say 2.6.20-16-generic.

---

[https://help.ubuntu.com/community/CompositeManager/AIGLXOnDapper](https://help.ubuntu.com/community/CompositeManager/AIGLXOnDapper)

but this how-to seems to be too old. For instance, the repositories mentioned don't seem to exists anymore.

### Post by michael37 on 2007-08-30
> **Tectuktitlay said:**
> 
but this how-to seems to be to old. For instance, the repositories mentioned don't seem to exists anymore.

Tec

Exactly, for example, the new Compiz Fusion repos exist only for the newer versions.

You can upgrade to Feisty using [this upgrade guide](http://ubuntuguide.org/wiki/Ubuntu:Feisty#Updates_and_Upgrades).    I think arguably the easiest way is to run "update-manager -c"

---

### Post by Tectuktitlay on 2007-08-30
I'm strongly considering it. But just out of curiosity, what happened to the LTS part of 6.06 LTS? I've been using Ubuntu for a few months now, and the LTS story is one of the reasons I chose to try Dapper and not Feisty...

Gr,

Tec

---

### Post by michael37 on 2007-08-30
> **Tectuktitlay said:**
> I'm strongly considering it. But just out of curiosity, what happened to the LTS part of 6.06 LTS? I've been using Ubuntu for a few months now, and the LTS story is one of the reasons I chose to try Dapper and not Feisty...

Gr,

Tec

Don't confuse LTS with the new feature releases!!! LTS means that the _existing dapper packages_ will be maintained and patched with critical bug fixes and security updates for 3 years.  New packages, such as Compiz Fusion, always require new versions of OS, new kernels, new drivers, and so on and so forth.

---

### Post by michael37 on 2007-09-02
> **Tectuktitlay said:**
> Hi Michael,

I understand. I'll probably upgrade to Feisty soon, when I have some spare time. It's just a bit frustrating since it seems that at one time it was possible to run Compiz on Dapper, but that era seems to be over. Thanks  for your advice.

Tec

I think you may be referring to 'old' Compiz, before the 

> 
*From [http://www.beryl-project.org/](http://www.beryl-project.org/)*
Beryl and Compiz (at least the extra plugins division of compiz) have merged. Please all welcome Compiz Fusion! You'll find the new forums at [http://forum.compiz-fusion.org](http://forum.compiz-fusion.org). The very first development release of Compiz Fusion happened on August 13, 2007 and is tagged 0.5.2, matching Compiz 0.5.2 release. Please check the release announcement.
